dimensions: Log (`destructive`, `bypass`, `optout`), action, source, `prompt_seq`, required extra-field set, pending/marker relation, and ledger relation
allowed_rows: destructive consumed by pre-tool-hook with tombstone evidence
destructive expired by user-prompt-hook or cleanup
bypass blocked, consumed, or resolved by stop-hook
bypass expired by user-prompt-hook or cleanup
opt-out pending by user-prompt-hook or stop-hook
opt-out expired by user-prompt-hook or cleanup.
forbidden_row_classes: approval without exact pending record hash and next prompt marker
expired delete without matching ledger mutation.
fixture_requirements: Prevent forged approval, consume, expire, and cleanup audit records
